'''Ivo''' was a communications [[Technician/Legends|technician]] on the [[Liberator (Imperial I-class)|''Liberator'']] when it was [[Second Battle of Coruscant|downed]] over [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. He survived, and detected signals from the incoming [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] rescue fleet.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Eyewitness to Apocalypse|book=Dark Empire Sourcebook}} {{1stm}}
